subject: Re: Fw: Fwd: Happy new year!
body:
Importance: High

Saved for 2012 but I can start to look for baby clothes if the wish turns into reality. Or would you stick with RL baby
around the corner? Forgot that you r planning everything

I will send you picture of the Burmese girl. Very pretty She is the star singer in Myamar. I will bring her to US. Obama
visits Myamar and Chan Chan comes to America. I think that I have something new and fresh news to promote

body: Wait a minute!!! Am I missing something?

subject: Re: Fw: Fwd: Happy new year!
body:
All the best in new year.
For more fun in new year.
And for little Jeffrey soon to come ;-)

Thank you for being such a great friend

Going to sleep. Still in Bangkok.

Boris

Sent from my Windows Phone
